name: PromptSignIn
description: PromptSignIn displays a prompt encouraging unauthenticated users to sign in. It extends the uikit Prompt component with a dedicated sign-in action button. Used in blog contexts to gate interactions like comments or reactions behind authentication.

props.name: onClickSignIn
props.description: Callback when the sign-in button is clicked

props.name: actions
props.description: Custom action buttons. Defaults to a single sign-in button

props.name: message
props.description: Prompt message text. Defaults to a localized sign-in prompt

examples:
<PromptSignIn
  title="Members only"
  message="Sign in to leave a comment"
  onClickSignIn={handleSignIn}
/>
